title: Filters and search options disappearing
excerpt:
Noticing this strange behaviour on my app. 
The filter and search options disappear as soon as the app loads! 
          

Please help

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Noticing this strange behaviour on my app.

The filter and search options disappear as soon as the app loads!

Please help

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kranthi_thoughtflow,

Can you send me your app ID? Feel free to DM me instead of posting it here.

Best,
Rachel

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @hen - My mistake. I had the “Hide board controls” option in the board view feature checked. This is resolved.
Thank you for the prompt check in

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for letting us know @kranthi_thoughtflow !
